LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ferality.description: Carriers slowly lose their mind over time. Without regular chemical intervention, they will eventually go feral and become hostile. Certain drugs can temporarily reduce ferality.
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ferality.label: ferality
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ghoul_Feral_Skin.description: Carriers have the completely degraded flesh of a feral ghoul.
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ghoul_Feral_Skin.label: feral ghoul skin
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ghoul_GlowingOne.description: Carriers of this gene emit a constant radioactive glow. They damage nearby non-ghouls with radiation while healing other ghouls. Glowing ones also heal from toxic buildup.
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ghoul_GlowingOne.label: glowing one
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ghoul_LongLived.description: Carriers of this gene age extremely slowly due to radiation-induced cellular changes. Ghouls can live well over 200 years.
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ghoul_LongLived.label: ghoul longevity
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ghoul_Skin.label: ghoul skin (tan)
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ghoul_Skin_GlowingOne.descripti: Carriers have the intensely radioactive, glowing green flesh of a glowing one.
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ghoul_Skin_GlowingOne.label: glowing one skin
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ghoul_Skin_Green.label: ghoul skin (green)
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ghoul_Skin_Peach.label: ghoul skin (peach)
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ghoul_Skin_Pink.label: ghoul skin (pink)
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_Ghoul_Skin_Yellow.label: ghoul skin (yellow)
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_ToxicHealing.description: Carriers have adapted to convert toxic buildup into healing energy. Their bodies use radiation and toxins as fuel for regeneration. They are completely immune to toxic damage.
LanguageData.FCP_Gene_ToxicHealing.label: toxic metabolism
